page_metadata.bioconda__summary: robust conversion of protein sequence alignments into the corresponding codon alignments
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Pal2nal converts a multiple sequence alignment of proteins and the corresponding dna (or mrna) sequences into a codon alignment. synonymous (ks) and non-synonymous (ka) substitution rates can be calculated.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: PAL2NAL converts a multiple sequence alignment of proteins and the corresponding DNA (or mRNA) sequences into a codon alignment. Synonymous (Ks) and non-synonymous (Ka) substitution rates can be calculated.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PAL2NAL converts a multiple sequence alignment of proteins and the corresponding DNA (or mRNA) sequences into a codon alignment. Synonymous (Ks) and non-synonymous (Ka) substitution rates can be calculated.
